MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Set For Case Management Conference On Aug-19-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of The Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALCATRAZ CRUISES, LLC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of The Arbitration.

Defendant Alcatraz Cruises, LLC's unopposed Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of The Arbitration is OFF CALENDAR.

Defendant's motion is ordered off calendar in light of the Stipulation and Order entered August 13, 2025.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
